guide.title: How mixing works
guide.step1text: Each product has a base price and starting effects. Weed strains start with one effect, meth/cocaine/shroom start with none.
guide.step2text: Each ingredient brings its primary effect. But it also transforms existing effects through reactions on the 2D mix map.
guide.step3text: Each existing effect's map position is shifted by the new effect's vector. If it lands in another effect's circle — that effect gets replaced.
guide.step4text: Price = Base × (1 + sum of all effects' bonuses). Effects with 0% bonus don't affect price.
guide.formulaText: Market Price = Base Price × (1 + Σ effect bonuses)
guide.tip1: Order matters! Different order = different reactions.
guide.tip2: 9 effects (Paranoia, Smelly, Toxic, etc.) have 0% bonus and don't increase price, but customers may prefer them.
guide.tip3: Max 8 effects per product. All 4 product types share the same mix map.

effectDescriptions.Calming: Induces a slight calmness in the player.
effectDescriptions.Euphoric: Induces mild euphoria in the player.
effectDescriptions.Disorienting: Causes unpredictable movement and slight visual impairment.
effectDescriptions.Gingeritis: After consumption, the player will become a ginger.
effectDescriptions.Sedating: Induces heavy sleepiness in the player.
effectDescriptions.Toxic: Damages the player's liver and induces vomiting.
effectDescriptions.Athletic: After consumption, the player is only able to run.
effectDescriptions.Foggy: Causes a cloud of fog to form around the player.
effectDescriptions.Seizure: Consumption results in an instant seizure.
effectDescriptions.Slippery: Reduces the player's ability to maintain traction.
effectDescriptions.Spicy: Consumption results in the player's eyes turning blue.
effectDescriptions.BrightEyed: Causes the player's eyes to emit light.
effectDescriptions.Glowing: Imbues a bioluminescence on the player.
effectDescriptions.Lethal: Causes total organ failure shortly after consumption.
effectDescriptions.ThoughtProvoking: Increases the size of the player's head.
effectDescriptions.AntiGravity: Weakens the effects of gravity on the player.
effectDescriptions.Cyclopean: Merges the player's eyes into one.
effectDescriptions.Electrifying: Electrifies the player, causing arcs of electricity.
effectDescriptions.Explosive: Causes the player to explode shortly after consumption.
effectDescriptions.LongFaced: Considerably increases the size of the player's head and neck.
effectDescriptions.Zombifying: Turns the player into a zombie.
